# services.draupnir

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.draupnir`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.draupnir.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Draupnir, a moderations bot for Matrix. |
| `services.draupnir.package` | `package` | The draupnir package to use. |
| `services.draupnir.secrets.accessToken` | `null or absolute path` | File containing the access token for Draupnir's Matrix account to be used in place of {option}`services.draupnir.settings.accessToken`. |
| `services.draupnir.secrets.pantalaimon.password` | `null or absolute path` | File containing the password for Draupnir's Matrix account when used in conjunction with Pantalaimon to be used in place of {option}`services.draupnir.settings.pantalaimon.password`. ::: {.warning} Take note that upstream has limited Pantalaimon and E2EE support: <https://the-draupnir-project.github.io/draupnir-documentation/bot/encryption> and <https://the-draupnir-project.github.io/draupnir-documentation/shared/dogfood#e2ee-support>. ::: |
| `services.draupnir.secrets.web.synapseHTTPAntispam.authorization` | `null or absolute path` | File containing the secret token when using the Synapse HTTP Antispam module to be used in place of {option}`services.draupnir.settings.web.synapseHTTPAntispam.authorization`. See <https://the-draupnir-project.github.io/draupnir-documentation/bot/synapse-http-antispam> for details. |
| `services.draupnir.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Free-form settings written to Draupnir's configuration file. See [Draupnir's default configuration](https://github.com/the-draupnir-project/Draupnir/blob/main/config/default.yaml) for available settings. |
| `services.draupnir.settings.dataPath` | `absolute path` | The path Draupnir will store its state/data in. ::: {.warning} This option is read-only. ::: ::: {.note} If you want to customize where this data is stored, use a bind mount. ::: |
| `services.draupnir.settings.homeserverUrl` | `string` | Base URL of the Matrix homeserver that provides the Client-Server API. ::: {.note} When using Pantalaimon, set this to the Pantalaimon URL and {option}`services.draupnir.settings.rawHomeserverUrl` to the public URL. ::: |
| `services.draupnir.settings.managementRoom` | `string` | The room ID or alias where moderators can use the bot's functionality. The bot has no access controls, so anyone in this room can use the bot - secure this room! Do not enable end-to-end encryption for this room, unless set up with Pantalaimon. ::: {.warning} When using a room alias, make sure the alias used is on the local homeserver! This prevents an issue where the control room becomes undefined when the alias can't be resolved. ::: |
| `services.draupnir.settings.rawHomeserverUrl` | `string` | Public base URL of the Matrix homeserver that provides the Client-Server API when using the Draupnir's [Report forwarding feature](https://the-draupnir-project.github.io/draupnir-documentation/bot/homeserver-administration#report-forwarding). ::: {.warning} When using Pantalaimon, do not set this to the Pantalaimon URL! ::: |
